name_en: Burberry House check wallet, featuring grained leather trim, crafted in an Italian workshop. Multiple compartments for organized storage. Detachable shoulder strap for use as a crossbody bag. Dimensions: 19 x 14 x 5 cm. Magnetic top flap closure, hand-painted edges, glossy metal hardware. Front features Burberry letterpress logo.

Detachable shoulder strap for use as a crossbody bag. Dimensions: 19 x 14 x 5 cm. Magnetic top flap closure, hand-painted edges, glossy metal hardware. Front features Burberry letterpress logo.
